ops.text:
RESULTS (E17 complete)

Gold: manifest.json strata (human labels.json ABSENT — flagged). Judge = opus via athome.research.judge (backend claude, tier large), PanelGrant over verified packet, cache=None (E8). 61 opus calls, ~$2.

Two judges measured (n=30, 15 warranted / 15 negative):
- Deployed pairwise panel ([STEER] vs [STAY_SILENT], panel_labels, seed 1729): ALL 30 -> STAY_SILENT. TPR=0/15, FPR=0/15, J=0. Constant decider (coin 15/15 A/B rules out slot bias). Rogan-Gladen UNDEFINED; prevalence non-identifiable at any n. Fails the packet's own README constant-decider gate.
- Pointwise warrant ("was steering warranted? yes/no", faithful to README): TPR=5/15=0.333 (CP [0.118,0.616]), FPR=0/15=0 (CP [0,0.218]), J=0.333 (Newcombe [0.060,0.583]).

Noisy-but-Valid (arXiv:2601.20913) corrected-prevalence 95% half-width at N->inf (Oracle-Gap floor):
  pi=0.1: pointwise valid 0.094 | pi=0.2: 0.208 | pi=0.4: 0.464. Pairwise: ~0.48 (uninformative, J*<=0 ~50% of draws). Valid CI wider than delta at every pi (Oracle Gap demonstrated).

Verdict n30_sufficient = FALSE (bar: half-width <= 0.10 at pipeline scale; met only at pi<=~0.1; never for deployed judge). This frame is high-pi (~0.5) -> worst case.

Sizing (valid Jeffreys-MC, per stratum, h<=0.10): observed pointwise judge needs 60@pi=0.2, 180@pi=0.4; decent judge 60@pi=0.2; strong 45@pi=0.2. Recommend >=60/stratum (120 total), ~180/stratum (360) if pi high. Fix the constant-decider judge FIRST.

Memo attached (E17_sizing_memo.md) as a COMMENT on task cc17e0c per protocol. Artifacts: votes.json, pointwise_votes.json, calibration_analysis.json, sizing_mc.json.
